reviews.comment:
En la mañana del sábado he sido atendido con muchas celeridad. El personal muy predispuesto ayudar. Necesitaba agua caliente para mate y me consiguieron inmediatamente sin exigir pago.  Gracias

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday morning I was served very quickly. The staff was very willing to help. I needed hot water for mate and they got it for me immediately without asking for payment. Thank you
